x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Alert-to-incident linkage provides Now Assist SIR with the threat signal context needed for AI attack pattern recognition and impact analysis. Without this linkage, AI can only analyze the incident record itself and misses the broader attack context that alerts provide.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var cutoff = new GlideDateTime(); cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90); var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("sn_si_incident"); gaTotal.addQuery("sys_created_on", ">=", cutoff.getValue()); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_applicable", actualValue: "No security incidents in last 90 days", finding: "No security incidents found in the last 90 days. Alert linkage cannot be assessed." }; } var gaLinked = new GlideAggregate("sn_si_incident"); gaLinked.addQuery("sys_created_on", ">=", cutoff.getValue()); gaLinked.addQuery("alert", "!=", ""); gaLinked.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaLinked.query(); var linked = gaLinked.next() ? parseInt(gaLinked.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((linked / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of security incidents linked to alerts (last 90 days, " + linked + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 50) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of security incidents are linked to alerts. Now Assist SIR has rich alert context for AI impact analysis and attack pattern recognition." }; } else if (pct >= 20) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of security incidents are linked to alerts (target: 50%+). Now Assist SIR AI impact analysis will have limited alert context." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of security incidents are linked to alerts. Now Assist SIR cannot perform meaningful AI attack pattern recognition without alert-to-incident linkage." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure alert rules to automatically link security alerts to incidents. Enable Event Management integration with SIR to ensure alerts from monitoring tools are correlated to security incidents.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c38
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Alert-to-incident linkage provides Now Assist SIR with the threat signal context needed for AI attack pattern recognition and impact analysis. Without this linkage, AI can only analyze the incident record itself and misses the broader attack context that alerts provide.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Security Alert and Event Linkage</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var cutoff = new GlideDateTime(); cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90); var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("sn_si_incident"); gaTotal.addQuery("sys_created_on", ">=", cutoff.getValue()); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_applicable", actualValue: "No security incidents in last 90 days", finding: "No security incidents found in the last 90 days. Alert linkage cannot be assessed." }; } var gaLinked = new GlideAggregate("sn_si_incident"); gaLinked.addQuery("sys_created_on", ">=", cutoff.getValue()); gaLinked.addQuery("alert", "!=", ""); gaLinked.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaLinked.query(); var linked = gaLinked.next() ? parseInt(gaLinked.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((linked / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of security incidents linked to alerts (last 90 days, " + linked + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 50) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of security incidents are linked to alerts. Now Assist SIR has rich alert context for AI impact analysis and attack pattern recognition." }; } else if (pct >= 20) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of security incidents are linked to alerts (target: 50%+). Now Assist SIR AI impact analysis will have limited alert context." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of security incidents are linked to alerts. Now Assist SIR cannot perform meaningful AI attack pattern recognition without alert-to-incident linkage." }; } })]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>SECOPS</module> <number>CHK0006161</number> <order>1000</order> <remediation_guidance>Configure alert rules to automatically link security alerts to incidents. Enable Event Management integration with SIR to ensure alerts from monitoring tools are correlated to security incidents.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>5603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c38</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
